Package org.atmosphere.cpr

Class AsyncIOWriterAdapter

java.lang.Object
org.atmosphere.cpr.AsyncIOWriterAdapter
All Implemented Interfaces:
AsyncIOWriter
Direct Known Subclasses:
AtmosphereInterceptorWriter, ByteArrayAsyncWriter
public class AsyncIOWriterAdapter extends Object implements AsyncIOWriter
Adapter class for AsyncIOWriter.
